question: Based on the stacked area chart showing quarterly store operations indicators, which statement is most appropriate about overall performance across the quarters?

options.A: Q4 has the best overall performance because its indicators appear most balanced.
options.B: Q1 has the best overall performance because it keeps negative indicators at the lowest levels.
options.C: The chart cannot determine overall performance accurately because it combines store metrics with different units into one total area.
options.D: Q2 has the best overall performance because it has the highest total area across all indicators.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Revenue, Energy Usage, etc.) into a cumulative area. These metrics have different units and meanings, so adding them together creates a meaningless total. The stacked area cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric analysis is valid.
